core_mechanism: ancilla-assisted encoding of a nonlinear state invariant into readout statistics: coupling an auxiliary probe subsystem to the target system through engineered controlled reversible (unitary) operations so that a chosen nonlinear functional of the target's state is mapped directly onto the probe's output measurement probabilities, allowing that functional to be read off without full reconstruction of the state
brief_reason: The abstract introduces auxiliary qubits and specific controlled unitary operations that map the analytical expressions of the entanglement measures onto the measurement probabilities of the circuit's output states, yielding direct quantitative readout without full state tomography.
